title: Packet 014 Publication Gate Draft Packet History Demotion Execution
objective: Normalize the remaining live-looking 2026-05-03 Olares Phase 5 Packet 014 artifact-publication and host-mirror resync-gate packet-definition singleton so that file no longer presents itself as a still-live Olares Packet 014 artifact-publication and host-mirror resync-gate packet after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical packet provenance with an explicit current-routing redirect.
dependency_note: After Packet 274 closed the adjacent `olares-phase-5-015` singleton, the nearest remaining current-looking residue in the same Olares Phase 5 draft lane is the successor `olares-phase-5-016` Packet 014 artifact-publication and host-mirror resync-gate singleton. Its surrounding packet-history now serves only as provenance, so the packet-definition JSON itself is the strongest adjacent live-looking residue.
execution_scope: Retitle the `olares-phase-5-016` packet-definition singleton as historical provenance.
Add explicit `historical_note` and `current_routing` fields to the packet JSON.
Preserve the original packet body below those top-entry routing fields without reopening publication execution, host-mirror resynchronization, or migration scope.
forbidden_scope: broad packet-archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing normalization
success_criteria: The `olares-phase-5-016` packet-definition singleton now reads as historical provenance instead of a live Olares Packet 014 artifact-publication and host-mirror resync-gate packet.
The file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and leaves no ambiguity about the next remaining adjacent residue check.
next_action: Close the adjacent `olares-phase-5-017` singleton so the next remaining Olares Phase 5 residue is explicit after the `olares-phase-5-016` closure.
